controls.stopping-recording-description: Saving - appears in history when finished
controls.stop-recording-description: Saves the recording to meeting history
controls.details-description: Share the code or link with anyone you want to invite. The host approves every guest.
controls.leave-description: You'll be removed from the call. The meeting continues for everyone else - you can rejoin while it's still in progress.
controls.end-all-description: All participants will be disconnected immediately. This action cannot be undone.
controls.end-all-point-recordings: Active recordings will stop and save to history.
controls.end-all-point-new-meeting: Anyone wanting to continue will need a new meeting.
controls.start-recording-confirm-description: Everyone will see a Recording indicator and hear a chime. Only people who attended can view the recording afterwards.
controls.start-recording-point-captures: Captures everyone's video, screen share, and audio.
controls.start-recording-point-auto-stop: Stops automatically when the meeting ends.

ended.heading: You left the meeting
ended.description: The call may still be in progress - you can rejoin while it's active, or head back home.
ended.paused-subline: You can stay here as long as you want.
ended.redirect-in: Returns you to the dashboard in {seconds}s.

waiting.subline-asking: The host has been notified. You will join automatically once they admit you.
waiting.subline-awaiting-host: The host hasn't started the meeting yet. You'll join automatically as soon as they arrive.
waiting.toast-admitted: You were admitted to the meeting
waiting.toast-declined: The host declined your request to join.

chat.title: Chat
chat.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to say something.

top-bar.rename-description: Update the title so participants and your meeting history can find it easily.
top-bar.clear-hint: Leave empty to clear the title.

knock.notify-body: Open the meeting to let them in.

toast.recording-saved-description: It will appear in this meeting's history within a few seconds.
toast.recording-started-description: Everyone will see a “Recording” indicator while it is active.
toast.recording-stopped: Recording stopped - it will appear in your meeting history.
toast.max-attachments: You can attach at most {max} files per message.
